case_title: GILBERTO RICARTE VS. TENANT ONE et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO AMEND COMPLAINT; FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION PURSUANT TO STIP AND FOR ENTYR OF JUDGMENT FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICARTE, GILBERTO

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICARTE, GILBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT ONE, TENANT UNKNOWN PERSONS IN POSSESSION OR OCCUPANCY DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICARTE, GILBERTO
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LARON, TOD E.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LARON, TOD E.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICARTE, GILBERTO ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT LARON, TOD E.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICARTE, GILBERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LARON, TOD E. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 175 CYPRESS STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, IN TOTAL, PLAINTIFF SHALL RECOVER $6,741.00 FROM DEFENDANT. (SEE SCANNED DOC)
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICARTE, GILBERTO

ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR 1)LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER; 2)FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS; AND 3)FOR A MONEY JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,556.00.
